content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Blood Cousins". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/208/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n, followed by n integers representing the array.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of operations required to make all elements in the array equal.

solution.approach: The problem can be solved by finding the lowest common ancestor of all nodes in the tree.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = [int(x) for x in input().split()]
# implement the solution here
